changes.description: Replaced f-string file_path interpolation with parameterized $fp query parameter
Replaced string-built IN clause with parameterized placeholders for edge types
Replaced string-built IN clause with parameterized placeholders for symbol labels
Parameterized get_all_relationships_by_types IN clause; fixed add_relationships docstring to reflect CREATE behavior
Added type_alias to label filter in _build_class_index; updated docstring
Removed invalid limit parameter from cmd_graph_suggest_scope and cmd_graph_enrich CLI handlers

verification.command: Pattern assertion: exports.py uses $fp param, no f-string file_path interpolation
Pattern assertion: heritage.py includes type_alias in label filter
Pattern assertion: workflow_memory.py has no limit= in suggest_scope/enrich calls
pytest regression suite (172 tests: model, walker, analysis, cli, core, visualization)
verification.detail: 113 failed, 24 passed, 35 errors — all failures are pre-existing kuzu cascade import, no new regressions
